description: During a contract negotiation, an in-house counsel needs to redline a clause and propose alternative language.

nodes.task_description: Identify the unfavorable clause in the draft agreement.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pinpoints the specific clause to be changed.

nodes.task_description: Draft a 'redline' version of the contract, striking through the original language and inserting the company's preferred language from its playbook.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a redlined version of the document showing the proposed changes.

nodes.task_description: Draft a cover email to the opposing counsel explaining the business and legal reasons for the proposed change.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent writes a persuasive email to accompany the redlined draft.
